page.wrapper: relative min-h-screen bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] text-[var(--ggc-text)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)] dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)]
page.content: flex flex-col min-h-screen opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200
page.breadcrumbNav: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-[5%] pt-4 pb-2 overflow-x-auto
page.breadcrumbList: flex flex-nowrap items-center font-body text-[clamp(0.6875rem,1.5vw,0.75rem)] tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--ggc-muted)] whitespace-nowrap min-w-0 dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)]
page.main: product-page-minimal max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-[5%] py-4 md:py-6
page.galleryBox: relative bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] overflow-hidden border border-[var(--ggc-border)] rounded-2xl shadow-sm group dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:shadow-[var(--ggc-dark-shadow)]

page.navBtn: absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-[var(--ggc-bg)]/95 border border-[var(--ggc-border)] opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] text-[var(--ggc-muted)] hover:text-[var(--ggc-text)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ggc-accent)] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)]/95 dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:hover:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)] dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)] dark:hover:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)] dark:focus:ring-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.navBtnNext: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-[var(--ggc-bg)]/95 border border-[var(--ggc-border)] opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] text-[var(--ggc-muted)] hover:text-[var(--ggc-text)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ggc-accent)] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)]/95 dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:hover:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)] dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)] dark:hover:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)] dark:focus:ring-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.thumbStrip: flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1 pt-1 snap-x scrollbar-hide
page.thumbBtn: relative flex-none aspect-square w-24 overflow-hidden snap-start border-2 rounded-lg border-[var(--ggc-border)] hover:border-[var(--ggc-accent)] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ggc-accent)] focus:ring-offset-2 bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:hover:border-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)] dark:focus:ring-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)]
page.thumbBtnActive: ring-2 ring-[var(--ggc-accent)] ring-offset-2 border-[var(--ggc-accent)] dark:ring-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.productInfo: space-y-3 relative lg:col-span-1 min-w-0 text-[var(--ggc-text)] dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)]
page.productTitle: font-display text-[clamp(1.5rem,4vw,1.875rem)] font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--ggc-text)] mb-1 uppercase dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)]
page.reviewRow: flex items-center gap-2 font-body text-sm text-[var(--ggc-muted)] dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)]
page.descriptionSection: rounded-2xl bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] overflow-hidden shadow-sm dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:shadow-[var(--ggc-dark-shadow)]
page.descriptionHeader: px-4 pt-4 pb-3 border-b border-[var(--ggc-border)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)]
page.descriptionHeaderTitle: font-display text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--ggc-muted)] flex items-center gap-3 dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)]
page.descriptionHeaderIcon: w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-[var(--ggc-border)] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-border)]
page.descriptionContentInner: rounded-lg bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] shadow-sm overflow-hidden dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:shadow-[var(--ggc-dark-shadow)]
page.descriptionContent: prose prose-sm max-w-none overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 text-[var(--ggc-text)] dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)]
page.descriptionOverlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-24 pointer-events-none bg-gradient-to-t from-[var(--ggc-bg)] via-[var(--ggc-bg)]/90 to-transparent dark:from-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)] dark:via-[var(--ggc-dark-bg)]/90
page.showMoreBtn: font-body inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[var(--ggc-muted)] hover:text-[var(--ggc-text)] bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] hover:bg-[var(--ggc-border)] px-5 py-2.5 rounded-sm border border-[var(--ggc-border)] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ggc-accent)] focus:ring-offset-2 dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)] dark:hover:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)] dark:hover:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:focus:ring-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.detailInfoBox: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] shadow-sm border-l-4 border-l-[var(--ggc-accent)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:shadow-[var(--ggc-dark-shadow)] dark:border-l-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.detailInfoIcon: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[var(--ggc-border)] flex-shrink-0 dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-border)]
page.detailInfoText: font-body text-sm font-medium text-[var(--ggc-text)] tracking-wide dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)]
page.relatedTitle: font-display text-[clamp(1.25rem,3vw,1.5rem)] font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--ggc-text)] mb-4 uppercase dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)]
page.relatedCardRoot: group product-card flex flex-col h-full bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border border-[var(--ggc-border)] hover:border-[var(--ggc-accent)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:shadow-[var(--ggc-dark-shadow)] dark:hover:border-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.relatedCardMedia: relative aspect-[3/4] min-h-[200px] overflow-hidden bg-[var(--ggc-border)] flex items-center justify-center dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-border)]
page.relatedCardNoImageWrap: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[var(--ggc-border)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-border)]
page.relatedCardSaleBadge: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-[var(--ggc-primary)] text-white text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
page.relatedCardTitle: text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-[var(--ggc-text)] group-hover:text-[var(--ggc-accent)] transition-colors duration-150 line-clamp-2 leading-snug mb-2 dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-text)] dark:group-hover:text-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.relatedCardArrow: text-[var(--ggc-muted)] group-hover:text-[var(--ggc-accent)] group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-all duration-150 flex-shrink-0 dark:text-[var(--ggc-dark-muted)] dark:group-hover:text-[var(--ggc-dark-accent)]
page.galleryColumnWrap: w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start
page.imageGridWrap: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start
page.imageGridItem: relative w-full min-w-0 aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded border border-[var(--ggc-border)] bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] dark:border-[var(--ggc-dark-border)] dark:bg-[var(--ggc-dark-surface)]
page.galleryWrap: space-y-5 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2
